meta.note: Pre-inception dates of late-listed components are back-filled with their first known close. The index therefore inherits a constant contribution from those components prior to their actual IPO.
meta.weighting_policy: Data pool for portfolio switching. Active UI portfolios override ticker weights.

CN10Y.name: China 10Y Government Bond Yield
CN10Y.synthetic_fallback: Synthetic local curve; yfinance has no stable China 10Y ticker.
